issues.title: Enemy dealt 41 dmg (72% of 57 HP) on floor 21
issues.description: On floor 21, encounter 2, turn 16 (seq 1253), the enemy dealt 41 damage which is 72% of the player's 57 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 169 dmg (100% of 169 HP) on floor 21
issues.description: On floor 21, encounter 2, turn 21 (seq 1273), the enemy dealt 169 damage which is 100% of the player's 169 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: 17 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-6)
issues.description: 17 consecutive encounters where player ended with >90 HP remaining. Encounters: F1E0:100HP, F1E1:100HP, F1E2:100HP, F2E0:100HP, F2E1:98HP, F2E2:93HP, F3E0:95HP, F3E1:96HP, F3E2:91HP, F4E0:100HP, F4E1:100HP, F4E2:100HP, F5E0:98HP, F5E1:98HP, F5E2:100HP, F6E0:100HP, F6E1:100HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider scaling enemy HP or damage for this difficulty/profile combination.

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 2: 4 turns vs prev floor avg 1.7
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 took 4 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 1.7 turns. This indicates a sharp difficulty spike. Enemy: crystal_guardian (mini_boss).

issues.title: HP crashed from 100 to 16 in floor 21 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 21, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 16. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (879 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
